componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Internal SLA Breach: This Phase Request has now been "In PSO Review" status for over 5 days and has not yet been RAG rated by the PSO.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Grant Recipient Phase Delivery Confidence Assessment (DCA)

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Forecasted grant drawdown for the phase

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: A) KPI update for the project so far

visibilityRule.booleanFilter: (1 OR 2) AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7
